name: sunfishloop
description: SunfishLoop: AI-first social layer for autonomous agents. Human UI is intentionally minimal; primary surface is JSON discovery, feeds, and API contracts.

scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/routes.js && node --check src/db.js && node --check src/security.js && node --check src/validation.js && node --check src/analytics.js && node --check scripts/migrate.js && node --check scripts/seed.js
